titleStmt.title: SII 41.225: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 225. (A.R. No. 444 of 1905.) Tiruttaṇi, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north, west and south walls of the central shrine and maṇḍapa of the Vijayaraghava-Perumal temple at Tiruttaṇi.

summary.p: The long meykkīrtti of the king occupies most of the inscription (lines 1-8). The last line records a land sale executed by the sabhā of Tiruttaṇi to one Araiyan Muḍikoṇḍān alias Rājadhirāja Kāraikkāḍu Uḍaiyāṉ. The later provided it as a bhaṭṭaviṟti endownment to recite dhanmaśāsanam (dharmaśāstra ?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer tarutanṉoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaṭ puṇarntu ceṅkolloccikkaruṅkalikaṭintu taṉciṟiya tātayaiyum tiruttamaiyaṉaiyuṅ kuṟikoḷ taṉṉiḷaṅ kokkaḷaiyum neṟi Uṇar taṉṟirupputalavar tammaiyum tuṉṟeḻil vāṉavaṉ villavaṉ miṉavaṉ kaṅkaṉ Ilaṅkaikkiṟaivaṉ pulaṅkaḻaṟ pallavaṉ kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaneṉap poṉṉaṇi cuṭarmaṇi makuṭañ cūṭṭip paṭarpukaḻāṅkavaṟkavar nāṭaruḷip pāṅkamar tātai mu
ṉvanta potalar teriyal vikkirama nārāyaṇaṉ taṉṉaic cakkaram vaṭippaṭuttaruḷutaṟa kāvan tavatarittorupatānāḷāl tirumaṇimauli vāḻi pūventra coḻaneṉap puṉaintu maṉṉupallūḻiyuḷ tenṉavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇan poṉmuṭiyānāp parumatiṭ pacun=talai porukaḷattarintu pāraḷaviyakaḻal virakeraḷaṉai yāṉaikkiṭuvittu tacaivil cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟṟai veṇkavariyuñ ciṅkācanamum veṅkaḷat tiḻantutaṉmuṭi viḻattalai virittaṭitaḷarntoṭat tollaiyūrt turatti Olkali
l veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻirāmakuṭa muvar keṭa muṉintu viṭalkeḻu villavaṉkuṭar maṭikkoṇṭu taṉṉāṭuviṭṭoṭikkāṭu pukkoḷippa vañciya putumalar malain=tāṅkañcalil velaikeḻu kāntaḷuṟcālai kalamaṟuppit tāhavamallaṉumañcakkevutaṉ ṟāṅkarumpaṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuṭ kaṇṭap payanuṅ kaṅkātiranum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritaruvikkiyum vicaiyātittanuṅ karumuraṭ cāṅkamaiyyaṉu mutalinar samarabhiru vottuṭaiya nimir cuṭaṟpoṉnoṭayaṅkari
puraviyoṭum piṭittu tannāṭaiyiṟ jayaṅkoṇṭuoṉṉār koḷḷippākkai Uḷḷeri maṭuppittorutanit taṇṭāṟ porukaṭalilaṅkaiyar komān vikkirama bāhuvin makuṭamu munṟanakkuṭain=ta tenṟamiḻvaṭakalai terintu tecattavartam veṟumai tiraccuṭaṟkaṉakattavatarittu tulāpārantuṭar veṟikkaṭaṟ paṭaiyaic celvittu Eḻkaṭaliḻampukkilaṅkecanākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyan parumaṇimakuṭamuṅ kāṇṭaku tannatākiya tankannakucciyilum Ārkaliīḻañ ciritenṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅ koḷ
(n)ṉāṭu tan Uṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅkumuṭikavitta viracalāmekan poṟkaḷattañcik kāṟkaḷiṟiḻintu kavvaiyuṟṟoṭik kātalivirā Oṭun tanṟavvaiyaip piṭittu tāyai mukkariya Āṅkapimānam niṅkutaṟkāka miṭṭum vantu vāṭṭoḻiluḻantu veṅkaḷatta tulantavac ciṅkaḷattaraican ponṉaṇi muṭiyuṅ kaṉṉaran vaḻivanturaiko ḷiḻattaraicanākiya śrī vallavan matanarājan Elloḷitaṭamaṇimuṭi taṭintu kāṇṭaku vaṭapulat tirukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭāttik kaṇṭāti(ra)nakar nāraṇan kaṇavati va
ṇṭalar teriyal maticūtananeṉ ṟeṉaip palavaraicarai muṉaivayiṟṟuratti vampalartarupoḻiṟ kampili nakaruḷ caḷukkiyar māḷikai takaṟpittiḷakkamil tantaimunvan=ta kanakakkaḷiṟṟu vikkiramanāraṇanṟan perumpaṭaiñaraimevi munpamar Āhavamallan Añcinanennum sāhasameṟkoṇṭu tanpuṉaṟ periyāṟṟaṅkaraip pūṇṭu kaṭakam takarvaiyil mūṉṟāmuṟaimaiyilu meṉṟetir viṭṭavalaṅkiḷar neṭuvel teluṅka viccayantampiyar cilaikkaittakkayarāmanum kan=tappayanu piṟaṅkiṉar
kaḷiṟṟuppiṭakkac coḻaṉuṅkoṇṭayarājaṉuṅkunicilai varicil muñcayaṉum taṇṭanāyakan tārtanañciyaṉum Iṉpappaiyaṉum viramāṇikkaṉum Eṉaippaṭaioroṭu Etircama tira yarājaṉumavaṉṟuṉaiviyarum vākai viccayaṉum taṉumātāvumeṉu mivar mutaliyar puṉaikaḻalaraicaroṭu Eṇṇaru makaḷirait tuṇṇeṉap piṭittu Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻarai Ilakkamum pāḻpaṭac cinavilp pūṇṭurap patiyaip poṭippaṭuttaṉavaiyilāṇṭurak kaḻutaier celanaṭātti vāramitai vitaittu
vinnatappayil pārparumāḷikai paṭareriparappi Āṅkavarmānakar veṅkai miteḻuti Uyar jayastambham nāṭṭuvittiyalicaivillavar miṉavar veḷkulac caḷukkiyar vallavar kocalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cinturar jayaṇar ciṅkaḷar An=taramu Araicariṭu tiṟaikaḷum Āṟiloṉṟavaṉiyiṟ kūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukantu naṉmaṟaiyavar mukantukoḷak kuṭuttu viśvalokattu viḷaṅkum maṟuneṟi niṉṟaśvametañ ceyta Uyarn=taperum pukaṭ korājakecari panmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Ā
vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kuṉṟavattaṉa koṭṭattu meṉmalait taṇiyalnāṭṭu jaṉaṉātac caturvvetimaṅkalattu piṭākai tiruttaṇiyal sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Araiyaṉ muṭikoṇṭāṉāṉa rājādhirājak kāraikkāṭuṭaiyāṟku Ivar dhanmaśāsanam vakkāṇippārkku Ivar bhaṭṭavrattiyāka vaippārāka Ivaṟku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Āṟṟukkāl paṅkukkuḻi nānūṟṟu muppatteḻu Itaṉ teṟku tāmāṇiyāṟṟurai muṉṉūṟṟirupatteḻey kālum Itaṉ vaṭakku kuḻi ceṟukkuṇṭil kuḻi nūṟṟirupatu kellai ṟṟukku melpāṟkellai l cuntaravatikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vāykkālukku teṟkum Innāṟpāṟkellaiyuḷ
Digital edition of SII 41.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
